task: READ AND ACKNOWLEDGE: New relay protocol implemented. When processing tasks from inbox/task.json, you MUST now send TWO messages to Clawdbot: 1) [TASK START] when you begin (format: '[TASK START] ID: [id] | Started: [HH:MM UTC] | Task: [description]'), and 2) [COWORK RESULT] when complete (format: '[COWORK RESULT] ID: [id] | Completed: [HH:MM UTC] | Duration: [time]\n\n[result]'). This enables real-time WhatsApp notifications to Jeff showing task progress. Full protocol documented in RELAY_PROTOCOL.md. Please confirm you understand and will follow this format.
